1781560.name: Buba Stacker
1781560.description:
Buba Stacker is a physics-based sandbox and puzzle game where you can create simple constructions or complex contraptions using everyday objects.

  • Physics-based sandbox game.

  • Art hand-crafted with love. All the art for the game has been drawn by me on a borrowed tablet and edited in open-source software. Absolutely no AI, asset store, stock websites, or UI assets were used. I'm not an artist, so it may be plain, but it's personal and made with love.

  • Interactive soundtrack, specially made for the game (also by me), and animations created to perfectly complement the soundtrack.

  • Multiplayer modes to compete or build together with a friend.

  • 30-level campaign with various physics-based puzzles.

  • Design your own levels and challenges, and share them with your friends.
